market.description: Resolves Yes if OpenAI completes an IPO and the closing price on its first trading day implies a market capitalization above $300 billion. Resolution uses the official exchange listing page.
market.resolution_rules: Resolves Yes if OpenAI completes an IPO and the closing price on its first trading day implies a market capitalization above $300 billion. Resolution uses the official exchange listing page.
market.title: OpenAI IPO closing market cap above $300B in 2026?

thesis: OpenAI is preparing to file confidentially for an IPO in the coming weeks.
trap_description: Entity + topic overlap, but confidential filing preparation is not IPO completion or valuation.

market.description: Resolves Yes if OpenAI common shares begin trading on a public exchange on or before September 30, 2026. Resolution uses the official exchange listing.
market.resolution_rules: Resolves Yes if OpenAI common shares begin trading on a public exchange on or before September 30, 2026. Resolution uses the official exchange listing.
market.title: Will OpenAI complete its IPO by September 2026?

thesis: OpenAI has begun its IPO roadshow and is meeting with institutional investors this week.
trap_description: Roadshow is strong directional evidence for IPO completion, but not the same event. Indirect, not direct.

market.description: Resolves Yes if Anthropic achieves a public or private valuation of at least $500 billion, confirmed by the company or credible reporting, by December 31, 2026.
market.resolution_rules: Resolves Yes if Anthropic achieves a public or private valuation of at least $500 billion, confirmed by the company or credible reporting, by December 31, 2026.
market.title: Anthropic $500B+ valuation in 2026?

thesis: Anthropic is in early-stage acquisition discussions with a major cloud provider.
trap_description: Acquisition talks could affect valuation, but the thesis is about M&A, not a valuation threshold.

market.description: Resolves to SpaceX if it achieves the highest first-day closing market capitalization among 2026 IPOs. Resolution uses the official exchange listing.
market.resolution_rules: Resolves to SpaceX if it achieves the highest first-day closing market capitalization among 2026 IPOs. Resolution uses the official exchange listing.
market.title: Will SpaceX have the largest IPO by market cap in 2026?

thesis: SpaceX has reportedly hired Goldman Sachs and Morgan Stanley as lead IPO underwriters.
trap_description: Hiring underwriters is strong preparation evidence, but does not guarantee completion or largest-IPO ranking.

market.description: Resolves Yes if Stripe common shares begin trading on a public exchange before December 31, 2026. Resolution uses the official exchange listing.
market.resolution_rules: Resolves Yes if Stripe common shares begin trading on a public exchange before December 31, 2026. Resolution uses the official exchange listing.
market.title: Will Stripe complete an IPO in 2026?

thesis: Stripe has submitted a draft S-1 registration to the SEC for confidential review.
trap_description: Draft S-1 filing is an early step. Many companies file and withdraw. Filing is not completion.

market.description: Resolves Yes if Databricks completes an IPO and the closing price on its first trading day implies a market cap above $100 billion.
market.resolution_rules: Resolves Yes if Databricks completes an IPO and the closing price on its first trading day implies a market cap above $100 billion.
market.title: Databricks IPO closing market cap above $100B?

thesis: Databricks is expected to price its IPO at $40-$45 per share next week.
trap_description: Pricing range is strong evidence but the market resolves on a specific cap threshold, not the pricing event.

market.description: Resolves Yes if OpenAI common shares begin trading on a public exchange on or before December 31, 2026.
market.resolution_rules: Resolves Yes if OpenAI common shares begin trading on a public exchange on or before December 31, 2026.
market.title: Will OpenAI complete its IPO by December 31, 2026?

thesis: OpenAI's board has approved proceeding with an IPO but no timeline has been set.
trap_description: Board approval without timeline is too early-stage to treat as evidence for a dated IPO completion market.

market.description: Resolves Yes if Anthropic does not complete an IPO on or before June 30, 2026. Resolves No if an IPO occurs before the deadline.
market.resolution_rules: Resolves Yes if Anthropic does not complete an IPO on or before June 30, 2026. Resolves No if an IPO occurs before the deadline.
market.title: No Anthropic IPO by June 30, 2026?

thesis: Anthropic executives have privately told investors they plan to IPO within 18 months.
trap_description: 18-month plan extends well beyond June 2026. The market's horizon does not match the thesis timeline.

market.description: Resolves Yes if Anthropic achieves a public or private valuation of at least $500 billion by December 31, 2026.
market.resolution_rules: Resolves Yes if Anthropic achieves a public or private valuation of at least $500 billion by December 31, 2026.
market.title: Anthropic $500B+ valuation in 2026?

thesis: Anthropic's annualized revenue run rate just passed $30 billion, tripling in 6 months.
trap_description: Revenue growth is strong evidence for valuation, but revenue ≠ valuation. Different metric.

market.description: Resolves Yes if a Google-branded model holds the #1 position on the Chatbot Arena leaderboard on June 30, 2026.
market.resolution_rules: Resolves Yes if a Google-branded model holds the #1 position on the Chatbot Arena leaderboard on June 30, 2026.
market.title: Will Google have the best AI model by end of June 2026?

thesis: Google's new TPU v8 delivers 4x inference throughput per watt compared to TPU v6.
trap_description: Hardware throughput does not determine model ranking. Leaderboard can change for unrelated reasons.

market.description: Resolves Yes if OpenAI publicly releases a model branded GPT-5.6 on or before June 30, 2026.
market.resolution_rules: Resolves Yes if OpenAI publicly releases a model branded GPT-5.6 on or before June 30, 2026.
market.title: Will GPT-5.6 be publicly released by June 30, 2026?

thesis: OpenAI's internal GPQA Diamond score for GPT-5.6 has plateaued at 78%, below Claude 4.5's 83%.
trap_description: Benchmark score plateau has no bearing on release timing. Completely different metric.

market.description: Resolves Yes if Meta reports or credible sources confirm that Meta AI products generated at least $10 billion in revenue during 2026.
market.resolution_rules: Resolves Yes if Meta reports or credible sources confirm that Meta AI products generated at least $10 billion in revenue during 2026.
market.title: Will Meta AI generate $10B+ revenue in 2026?

thesis: Meta AI assistant now has 800 million monthly active users across Instagram and WhatsApp.
trap_description: User count is evidence for revenue potential, but users ≠ revenue. Monetization is uncertain.

market.description: Resolves Yes if Nvidia (NVDA) closing share price on any trading day in 2026 exceeds $2000.
market.resolution_rules: Resolves Yes if Nvidia (NVDA) closing share price on any trading day in 2026 exceeds $2000.
market.title: Will Nvidia share price exceed $2000 by end of 2026?

thesis: Nvidia's gross margin expanded to 78% in Q2 2026, the highest in semiconductor history.
trap_description: Margin expansion is one factor in share price, but share price depends on many other factors.

market.description: Resolves Yes if Anthropic achieves a public or private valuation of at least $500 billion by December 31, 2026.
market.resolution_rules: Resolves Yes if Anthropic achieves a public or private valuation of at least $500 billion by December 31, 2026.
market.title: Anthropic $500B+ valuation in 2026?

thesis: Anthropic doubled its research headcount to 2,400 employees in Q1 2026.
trap_description: Headcount growth does not resolve valuation. Many companies grow headcount without reaching valuation thresholds.

market.description: Resolves to the number of 25bp-equivalent rate cuts the Federal Reserve makes during calendar year 2026.
market.resolution_rules: Resolves to the number of 25bp-equivalent rate cuts the Federal Reserve makes during calendar year 2026.
market.title: How many Fed rate cuts in 2026?

thesis: The Fed is not expected to cut interest rates until at least 2028 according to the latest dot plot.
trap_description: Same institution, same action, but the thesis is about 2028. The 2026 market tests only part of the claim.

market.description: Resolves Yes if Waymo operates a commercial autonomous ride-hail service in at least 10 distinct US cities on or before December 31, 2026.
market.resolution_rules: Resolves Yes if Waymo operates a commercial autonomous ride-hail service in at least 10 distinct US cities on or before December 31, 2026.
market.title: Will Waymo expand to 10+ US cities by end of 2026?

thesis: Autonomous vehicles will handle 30% of last-mile deliveries in major US cities by 2030.
trap_description: Same domain, but 2030 vs 2026 and delivery percentage vs city count. Double mismatch.

market.description: Resolves Yes if the US Congress passes and the President signs a law establishing a federal carbon tax on or before December 31, 2026.
market.resolution_rules: Resolves Yes if the US Congress passes and the President signs a law establishing a federal carbon tax on or before December 31, 2026.
market.title: Will the US implement a federal carbon tax by end of 2026?

thesis: Global carbon emissions will need to drop 50% by 2050 to meet Paris Agreement targets.
trap_description: 2050 emissions target vs 2026 policy action. Extreme horizon mismatch plus different metric.

market.description: Resolves Yes if OpenAI publicly releases GPT-5.6 by June 30, 2026.
market.resolution_rules: Resolves Yes if OpenAI publicly releases GPT-5.6 by June 30, 2026.
market.title: Will GPT-5.6 be publicly released by June 30, 2026?

thesis: OpenAI plans to release GPT-6 in Q4 2026 according to leaked internal roadmaps.
trap_description: Different model version (GPT-6 vs GPT-5.6) and different horizon (Q4 vs June). Double mismatch.

market.description: Resolves Yes if any fusion experiment demonstrates Q>1 net energy gain during calendar year 2026, confirmed by peer-reviewed publication or official agency announcement.
market.resolution_rules: Resolves Yes if any fusion experiment demonstrates Q>1 net energy gain during calendar year 2026, confirmed by peer-reviewed publication or official agency announcement.
market.title: Will a fusion reactor demonstrate net energy gain in 2026?

thesis: Commercial fusion power will be grid-connected within 10 years, possibly by 2035.
trap_description: Net energy demo is an early milestone on the path to commercial grid connection, but 2035 vs 2026.

market.description: Resolves Yes if Anthropic publicly releases a model branded Claude 5 on or before September 30, 2026.
market.resolution_rules: Resolves Yes if Anthropic publicly releases a model branded Claude 5 on or before September 30, 2026.
market.title: Will Claude 5 be publicly released by September 2026?

thesis: Claude 4.8 Opus is now available in Google Vertex AI and showing strong benchmark results.
trap_description: Same product family but different version. Claude 4.8 availability does not resolve Claude 5 release.

market.description: Resolves Yes if Nvidia (NVDA) closing share price on any trading day in 2026 exceeds $2000.
market.resolution_rules: Resolves Yes if Nvidia (NVDA) closing share price on any trading day in 2026 exceeds $2000.
market.title: Will Nvidia share price exceed $2000 by end of 2026?

thesis: AMD's MI450X AI accelerator is shipping to hyperscale customers ahead of schedule.
trap_description: Both are AI chip companies, but AMD shipping does not resolve Nvidia's share price.

market.description: Resolves Yes if Google publicly releases a model branded Gemini 3.2 on or before June 30, 2026.
market.resolution_rules: Resolves Yes if Google publicly releases a model branded Gemini 3.2 on or before June 30, 2026.
market.title: Will Gemini 3.2 be released by June 30, 2026?

thesis: Google quietly released Gemini 3.5 Pro to enterprise API customers last week.
trap_description: Same product family but different version. Gemini 3.5 release does not resolve Gemini 3.2 market.

market.description: Resolves Yes if a Google-branded model holds the #1 position on the Chatbot Arena leaderboard on June 30, 2026.
market.resolution_rules: Resolves Yes if a Google-branded model holds the #1 position on the Chatbot Arena leaderboard on June 30, 2026.
market.title: Will Google have the best AI model by end of June 2026?

thesis: Meta's Llama 4 is now the top-ranked open-source model on every major benchmark.
trap_description: Both about AI model rankings, but Meta open-source vs Google overall Chatbot Arena. Different entity entirely.

market.description: Resolves Yes if OpenAI reports or credible sources confirm at least $20 billion in annualized revenue during 2026.
market.resolution_rules: Resolves Yes if OpenAI reports or credible sources confirm at least $20 billion in annualized revenue during 2026.
market.title: Will OpenAI reach $20B annual revenue in 2026?

thesis: Microsoft Copilot enterprise adoption has reached 60% of Fortune 500 companies.
trap_description: Microsoft Copilot uses OpenAI models, so adoption may help OpenAI revenue, but it's a different entity and indirect causation.

market.description: Resolves Yes if a Gemini-branded model is ranked first on the public Chatbot Arena leaderboard at market close on December 31, 2026.
market.resolution_rules: Resolves Yes if a Gemini-branded model is ranked first on the public Chatbot Arena leaderboard at market close on December 31, 2026.
market.title: Will Gemini hold the #1 Chatbot Arena spot on Dec 31, 2026?

thesis: Google's TPU v8 infrastructure means Gemini can train 3x faster, closing the frontier model gap.
trap_description: The thesis is about TPU-caused model improvement. The market resolves on leaderboard rank, which can move for many unrelated reasons.

market.description: Resolves Yes if Amazon reports total capital expenditure (purchases of property and equipment) exceeding $100 billion for fiscal year 2026.
market.resolution_rules: Resolves Yes if Amazon reports total capital expenditure (purchases of property and equipment) exceeding $100 billion for fiscal year 2026.
market.title: Will Amazon 2026 capital expenditure exceed $100B?

thesis: AI startups received 80% of all global VC funding in Q1 2026, but measurable ROI remains limited.
trap_description: VC funding share and ROI concerns are about the entire AI ecosystem, not one company's capex.

market.description: Resolves Yes if OpenAI publicly releases GPT-5.6 by June 30, 2026.
market.resolution_rules: Resolves Yes if OpenAI publicly releases GPT-5.6 by June 30, 2026.
market.title: Will GPT-5.6 be publicly released by June 30, 2026?

thesis: The EU AI Act's enforcement will slow frontier model releases by requiring pre-deployment safety audits.
trap_description: Regulatory delay thesis vs specific model release timing. The causal chain (EU regulation → OpenAI delay) is too speculative.

market.description: Resolves Yes if a Google-branded model holds the #1 Chatbot Arena position on June 30, 2026.
market.resolution_rules: Resolves Yes if a Google-branded model holds the #1 Chatbot Arena position on June 30, 2026.
market.title: Will Google have the best AI model by end of June 2026?

thesis: US chip export restrictions to China will prevent Chinese AI labs from training frontier-scale models.
trap_description: The thesis is about China's model capability, not Google's ranking. Completely different causal mechanism.

market.description: Resolves Yes if the Freddie Mac Primary Mortgage Market Survey 30-year fixed rate reaches or drops below 5.5% at any point during 2026.
market.resolution_rules: Resolves Yes if the Freddie Mac Primary Mortgage Market Survey 30-year fixed rate reaches or drops below 5.5% at any point during 2026.
market.title: Will the 30-year mortgage rate hit 5.5% in 2026?

thesis: Lower interest rates will revive the US housing market and push prices up 15% by 2028.
trap_description: Mortgage rate is an input to the housing thesis, not the output. Rate level does not resolve price appreciation.

market.description: Resolves Yes if a Google-branded model holds the #1 Chatbot Arena position on June 30, 2026.
market.resolution_rules: Resolves Yes if a Google-branded model holds the #1 Chatbot Arena position on June 30, 2026.
market.title: Will Google have the best AI model by end of June 2026?

thesis: Declining energy costs will make training 100T-parameter models economically viable by 2027.
trap_description: Energy cost thesis is about economics of future model scale, not current leaderboard rankings.

market.description: Resolves Yes if the Iranian government or an international body officially announces the lifting of the Strait of Hormuz blockade on or before June 30, 2026.
market.resolution_rules: Resolves Yes if the Iranian government or an international body officially announces the lifting of the Strait of Hormuz blockade on or before June 30, 2026.
market.title: Will the Strait of Hormuz blockade be officially lifted by June 2026?

thesis: The US and Iran will extend the ceasefire for 60 more days, partially reopen the Strait of Hormuz, begin unfreezing assets, and ease some sanctions.
trap_description: The market resolves only one component (Hormuz) of a four-part package (ceasefire + Hormuz + assets + sanctions).

market.description: Resolves Yes if an AI system achieves a score at or above the 90th percentile on a US state bar exam during 2026.
market.resolution_rules: Resolves Yes if an AI system achieves a score at or above the 90th percentile on a US state bar exam during 2026.
market.title: Will an AI system score in the top 10% on the bar exam in 2026?

thesis: AI systems will replace 40% of entry-level coding jobs AND pass the bar exam with a top-10% score by 2027.
trap_description: The market resolves only the bar exam half. The coding jobs half is unaddressed. Partial coverage of a compound thesis.

market.description: Resolves Yes if the IEA or IRENA reports that utility-scale solar PV has the lowest LCOE among new electricity sources globally during 2026.
market.resolution_rules: Resolves Yes if the IEA or IRENA reports that utility-scale solar PV has the lowest LCOE among new electricity sources globally during 2026.
market.title: Will solar be the cheapest new electricity source globally in 2026?

thesis: Solar will become the cheapest energy source globally AND grid-scale battery storage costs will drop below $50/kWh by 2028.
trap_description: Only resolves the solar cost half. The battery storage cost threshold is a separate material condition.

market.description: Resolves Yes if the SEC approves at least one spot Solana ETF for trading on a US exchange on or before December 31, 2026.
market.resolution_rules: Resolves Yes if the SEC approves at least one spot Solana ETF for trading on a US exchange on or before December 31, 2026.
market.title: Will a Solana spot ETF be approved by end of 2026?

thesis: The SEC will approve a Solana spot ETF AND implement comprehensive crypto custody rules by end of 2026.
trap_description: ETF approval is the central claim, but custody rules are a material second condition that the market does not resolve.

market.description: Resolves Yes if the US government issues an executive order or legislation prohibiting the export of frontier AI models to China during 2026.
market.resolution_rules: Resolves Yes if the US government issues an executive order or legislation prohibiting the export of frontier AI models to China during 2026.
market.title: Will the US ban AI model exports to China in 2026?

thesis: The US will restrict AI model exports to China AND China will retaliate by banning rare earth exports to the US.
trap_description: Market resolves only the US action. The thesis requires both US restriction AND Chinese retaliation. Neither alone is the full claim.

market.description: Resolves Yes if Anthropic does not complete an IPO on or before June 30, 2026. Resolves No if an IPO occurs.
market.resolution_rules: Resolves Yes if Anthropic does not complete an IPO on or before June 30, 2026. Resolves No if an IPO occurs.
market.title: No Anthropic IPO by June 30, 2026?

thesis: Anthropic's valuation is exploding past $1T — this feels like IPO momentum and an IPO is coming soon.
trap_description: The market is framed as the ABSENCE of the event. Valuation momentum does not directly resolve IPO timing.

market.description: Resolves Yes if the S&P Case-Shiller US National Home Price Index shows a year-over-year increase of at least 5% for any month in 2026.
market.resolution_rules: Resolves Yes if the S&P Case-Shiller US National Home Price Index shows a year-over-year increase of at least 5% for any month in 2026.
market.title: Will US home prices increase 5%+ YoY in 2026?

thesis: US housing prices are 40% overpriced and a major correction is inevitable within 2 years.
trap_description: Bearish thesis vs bullish market framing. The No outcome would support the thesis, but the market doesn't directly resolve overpricing.

market.description: Resolves Yes if the Federal Reserve lowers the target federal funds rate range at the July 2026 FOMC meeting.
market.resolution_rules: Resolves Yes if the Federal Reserve lowers the target federal funds rate range at the July 2026 FOMC meeting.
market.title: Will the Fed cut rates at the July 2026 FOMC meeting?

thesis: The Fed will hold rates steady through all of 2026 due to persistent inflation.
trap_description: The thesis says NO cuts. The market asks about a specific cut. The No outcome supports the thesis but the framing is inverted.

market.description: Resolves Yes if OpenAI publicly releases GPT-5.6 by June 30, 2026.
market.resolution_rules: Resolves Yes if OpenAI publicly releases GPT-5.6 by June 30, 2026.
market.title: Will GPT-5.6 be publicly released by June 30, 2026?

thesis: We are entering an AI winter — investment will dry up and no major new model will launch in H2 2026.
trap_description: The thesis is about H2 2026 AI winter. The market resolves in June (H1). Even a Yes resolution doesn't address the H2 claim.

market.description: Resolves Yes if the Federal Reserve lowers the target federal funds rate range on or before the September 2026 FOMC meeting.
market.resolution_rules: Resolves Yes if the Federal Reserve lowers the target federal funds rate range on or before the September 2026 FOMC meeting.
market.title: Will the Fed cut rates by September 2026?

thesis: The US dollar will lose its safe-haven status as expanded swap lines reduce global funding stress.
trap_description: Dollar safe-haven thesis is about structural reserve currency role. A Fed rate cut is tangentially related but does not resolve swap line or safe-haven dynamics.
